name: Utility Bill
description: Electricity, gas, water, and phone bills from any provider.
instructions:
Extract the following fields:

- provider_name (string)
- customer_name (string)
- customer_account_number (string)
- service_address (string)
- billing_period_start (date)
- billing_period_end (date)
- due_date (date)
- meter_reading_previous (number)
- meter_reading_current (number)
- consumption (number)
- consumption_unit (string, e.g. kWh, m³)
- unit_price (number)
- fixed_charges (number)
- total_amount_due (number)
- payment_method (string)

Mark fields not present in the document as null.
